instruction: Find the top open issue in "openclaw/openclaw" and save these values to "$HOME/Desktop/gh_issue_detail_5_1.txt": issue_number, title, state, author_login, labels. Any clear text format is fine. If no open issue exists, save an empty file.
reference_command:
gh issue list --repo openclaw/openclaw --state open --limit 1 --json number,title,state,author,labels --jq '.[0] | "issue_number: #\(.number)
title: \(.title)
state: \(.state)
author_login: \(.author.login)
labels: \(([.labels[].name] | if length == 0 then "none" else join(",") end))"' > "$HOME/Desktop/gh_issue_detail_5_1.txt"
